title: nephrodium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum, also known as the parallelogram fern, is a variant of the male fern (Nephrodium filix-mas), a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and anthelmintic, helping to expel parasitic worms from the body. The health benefits of Nephrodium filix-mas var. parallelogrammum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are typically made by steeping the fronds in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
